comparison_with_previous.previous_result: #330 SILENT_ERROR — NDJSON template caused JSON parse error at position 216
comparison_with_previous.improvement: No improvement — Notion frontend still silently drops the APF response
comparison_with_previous.root_cause: Notion AI chat expects specific response format from runInferenceTranscript. Single JSON error template does not match expected format, so frontend ignores it silently.

recommendation: Notion AI uses streaming NDJSON (newline-delimited JSON) for its runInferenceTranscript endpoint. Need to reverse-engineer exact response format and create a valid NDJSON template that contains warning text Notion will actually render. Alternatively, use DOM injection approach.
